overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a coastal prison facility during golden hour. The character walks along an exterior platform with ocean views, passes an American flag, encounters other characters near the entrance, and enters the building to traverse a dimly lit interior corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal prison exterior walkway with ocean view

agents.ego_description: Walking along the exterior platform of the coastal facility, observing the institutional building and distant ocean views

entered.detail: Large concrete prison facility with barred windows and institutional architecture
Calm ocean water visible beyond the coastal edge
Red suspension bridge visible in the distant haze
American flag on flagpole waving in the wind
Metal safety railing along the edge of the platform
Weathered stone tile pavement of the walkway
Green bushes and shrubs along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open-air platform of a coastal prison facility during golden hour. The institutional building dominates the right side with its barred windows, while the ocean and a distant bridge are visible to the left. An American flag waves prominently as the character moves forward along the stone pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison entrance plaza with information signage

events.description: group of NPCs comes into view standing near the building entrance
character enters the building through the main doorway

agents.ego_description: Approaching the building entrance along the stone walkway, passing other individuals standing near the entrance

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near the building entrance

entered.detail: White informational sign with text and images mounted on the wall
Cluster of game characters gathered near the entrance area
Main doorway entrance to the institutional building with ornate archway
Distant ruined building structure visible beyond the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the exterior approach to the prison entrance. An information sign appears on the left wall, and a group of NPCs stands near the doorway ahead. The American flag and ocean views recede as the character moves toward the entrance and transitions indoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison interior corridor with wanted posters

agents.ego_description: Walking through the dimly lit interior corridor, passing information racks and wanted posters on the walls

entered.detail: Worn concrete walls of the interior hallway with pipes and fixtures
Framed wanted posters mounted on the corridor walls
Overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the corridor
Metal rack with brochures and pamphlets against the wall
Doorways leading to other rooms along the corridor
Red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, artificially lit interior corridor. The walls display wanted posters and informational materials, while fluorescent lights provide dim illumination. The space is enclosed with no natural light, creating a stark contrast to the bright exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air coastal platform into the claustrophobic, dimly lit interior of a prison facility. It begins with the character walking along a stone pavement during golden hour, flanked by a barred institutional building on the right and expansive views of the ocean and a distant bridge to the left. As the character moves forward past a waving American flag, the scene shifts toward the prison entrance where an information sign appears and a group of NPCs gathers near the doorway. The camera then transitions from the warm natural light of the exterior into a narrow interior corridor, where the open horizon is replaced by enclosed walls. Finally, the environment becomes stark and artificial, with fluorescent lights illuminating wanted posters and informational materials along the dim hallway.
